\def\rowref{claim\_3\_30}
\phantomsection\label{claim_3_30}

\begin{Rem}[IdSeparationProperties]
    \begin{enumerate}
        \item A similar result from Proposition \refrow{claim_3_23} holds for $id$-separation as well.
        \item $id$-separation is stable under marginalization, similar to Lemma \refrow{claim_3_25}.
    \end{enumerate}
\end{Rem}
